raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a fraudulent charge under investigation by Citi Bank.

Despite receiving two letters confirming that the charges were being investigated and that I would not be liable during the process, Citi has reported a late payment to my credit report. I was also verbally assured that no interest or payment would be due during this period.

However, Citi has applied interest and marked my account as past due, which is now reflected negatively on my credit report. I have repeatedly contacted customer service, but no action has been taken to remove the false report.

I request Citi to : 1. Remove the late payment record from all credit bureaus.

2. Waive any interest or late fees applied during the investigation.

3. Provide a written confirmation that the issue has been resolved.

Citi likely has phone recordings of the calls where this was confirmed.

Attached are two letters from Citi confirming the ongoing fraud investigation.
